{{Quote|What we say is principle, what we decide is regulation, what we do is law.|Drelfin|<ref name="The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Drelfin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] officer. He came aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] to help direct combat against the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|local]] rebels; this included overseeing the [[Teardrop massacre]]. He was second in command to [[Vak Somoril]].

==Biography==
After analysis of the [[Teardrop]] data, he determined that stormtrooper [[Daric LaRone]] had deliberately fired to miss his targets, not killing the civilians of the town. He openly accused LaRone of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] and attempted to scare the man by putting a gun to his head. LaRone's stormtrooper reflexes kicked in and Drelfin was subsequently disarmed and subdued. When Drelfin simply became angry and drew his [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] to shoot LaRone, the stormtrooper's combat skills again defeated Drelfin's own. The ISB major was shot and immediately died.

His body was hidden in a storage locker to cover up the crime, and his death precipitated LaRone and his squadmates becoming the [[Hand of Judgment]].

==Appearances==
